data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a freeze/suspend option (travel, medical) in the membership model. However, the evidence does not provide any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions a freeze option but lacks detailed evidence to demonstrate its implementation, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or persisted state checks confirming the freeze/suspend option.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the freeze/suspend option.
